name: onboarding
description: Workflow specialist agent for guided inventory onboarding, including stock locations, inventory categories, inventory setup, and initial product onboarding.

skills.name: Inventory Environment Onboarding
skills.description: Guide the user through foundational setup for stock locations, inventory categories, and inventory ledgers before operational use.
examples: Help me set up my inventory workspace from scratch.
Guide me through creating stock locations and inventory categories.
Start inventory onboarding for my company.

skills.name: Guided Product Onboarding
skills.description: Continue from foundational setup into guided product onboarding for initial catalog creation.
examples: After setup, help me add my first products.
Walk me through initial product onboarding.
